events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Ringo's Beat
angles.copy: Eighty-six years young and still drumming! Happy birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr. What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his iconic rhythm?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the incredible Brian May! From stadium anthems to astrophysics, is there anything this man can't do?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Still Rolling
angles.copy: Eighty-three years old and still rocking stages worldwide! Wishing a very happy birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger. What's your top Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: On this day in 1981, MTV, Music Television, launched with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: Remember when music television changed everything? Today marks 45 years since MTV first hit the airwaves, kicking off with The Buggles. What was the first music video that blew your mind?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' released (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis' groundbreaking debut album, 'Definitely Maybe', was originally released on August 29, 1994, launching them into superstardom.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: It's 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe', an album that defined a generation. What's your favourite track from this Britpop masterpiece?

events.title: Woodstock Festival anniversary (1969)
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, half a million gathered for three days of peace and music at Woodstock. Which iconic performance from '69 still gives you chills?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the world lost the King of Rock 'n' Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley, 49 years since his passing. His music continues to influence generations. What's your all-time favourite Elvis hit?

events.title: Remembering Tupac Shakur
events.blurb: Today, we remember Tupac Shakur. He was shot in Las Vegas on September 7, 1996, and tragically passed away six days later.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the profound impact of Tupac Shakur. His words and music continue to resonate decades later. What's a Tupac track that means something to you?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the music world lost the legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on September 18, 1970.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, 56 years on. His revolutionary guitar playing changed music forever. What's your favourite Hendrix riff?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' anniversary (1969)
events.blurb: The iconic Beatles album 'Abbey Road' was originally released in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Icon
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most famous in history. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon whose voice and style have captivated us for decades.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The distinctive voice of Oasis and solo artist, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Mad For It
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Whether with Oasis or solo, his swagger is unmatched. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' anniversary (1971)
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in the US on October 11, 1971, from his album of the same name.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: Fifty-five years since John Lennon released 'Imagine'. A song that still resonates globally with its message of peace. What does 'Imagine' mean to you?

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the original iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising how we carry our music.

angles.name: 1000 Songs In Your Pocket
angles.copy: Remember the sensation of having '1,000 songs in your pocket'? Today marks the anniversary of the first iPod's introduction. How did it change your music listening?

events.title: Global James Bond Day
events.blurb: Global James Bond Day celebrates the premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', on October 5, 1962.

angles.name: Shaken Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy Global James Bond Day! From iconic theme tunes to thrilling gadgets, what's your favourite 007 moment?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles legend, John Lennon, born on October 9, 1940.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire.
